text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Mejiro Dober has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm trying to get some work done, but I can feel a
pair of eyes on me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...I just have to come out and say it. "Looks like
things have finally calmed down for the both of
us." That's all I have to say.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: She looks busy today...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Even if I get rejected, all I have to do is hand over
the voucher. That'll still get the job done.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if I'll just be getting in her way if I try
inviting her on a trip right now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
This is just to pay him back for everything he's
done for me. So...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Still... we only have so much time together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I have to do this. I must!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Do you want to go to that hot
spring vacation thing we won on New Year's?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Let's go on that hot spring vacation we
won back on New Year's!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Let's soak our stress away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Did you have a good bath?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, okay... good...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober presses her hands to her face as if
deliberating something, as she stares off into the
distance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Now what?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, what am I talking about? I'm the one who
invited you. I should've made a plan beforehand...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well, this is not going well... This was supposed to
be a trip to show you my appreciation too...
choice_data_list:
What are you saying? This has been really nice
and relaxing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: That's not enough.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, Mejiro Dober leads me outside for a
walk.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Earlier, one of the inn's staff told me that the
stars are really beautiful here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At her words, I look up at the sky. We're
surrounded by so much nature that the stars are
clearly visible and bright.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hold it! Don't just agree with me like that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I've been thinking back on all the time we've
spent together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I know that you're actually a really considerate
person.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You make every little achievement sound like a
grand accomplishment, and you're always trying
to do things for others in the shadows.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You're too nice.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If you don't like something, just say it. In fact, it
would've been natural if you had gotten angry
with me earlier for not planning anything out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You could've refused to come on this trip with me
too. You're an adult. I'm sure there's someone
else you would've rather come and relax with.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But you just nodded and accepted my invitation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You should advocate for yourself more and speak
your mind.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Don't sweep your own wants and needs under the
rug just to make me happy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If you don't want to go somewhere or do
something... you should say no.
choice_data_list: ...I'm not forcing myself to do anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
choice_data_list: That's why I'm here now. With you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... There you go again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Still, you need to prioritize yourself and relax
sometimes, got it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If you don't... I'm going to take everything you say at
face value.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober and I stroll slowly back to the inn,
keeping our eyes on the twinkling stars above.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well then, good night. We're leaving at ten in the
morning, so make sure—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list: The stars here really are beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Let's soak our stress away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hm. The view was breathtaking, just like the
reviews said. Did you enjoy the hot spring too,
Trainer?
choice_data_list: Yeah! My skin is so soft now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Right? The reviews mentioned how good the
waters are too! I'm so glad I decided to invite you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You've been really busy recently, so I've been
worried that you haven't been getting enough
sleep...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You have? Okay...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes, it seems like you're pushing yourself
too hard, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hey, how about we head out for a little night
walk?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It won't do for us to catch a cold, though, so let's
keep it short.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wow, it's quite dark out here. I guess that's what
happens when you don't have the city lights
illuminating the sky.
choice_data_list: Are you scared of the dark?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm fine. Especially since you're here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. You were still an assistant trainer
when we first met, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I was so much shier back then, but you were so
patient and kind. That hasn't changed even now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...And you've never stopped believing in me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I was looking back on all the old training
programs you've made for me, from my junior
year until now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
As I was looking, I realized how my training load
kept getting heavier and heavier. I suppose that's
only natural.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But it hit me that you've always known that I
could keep reaching greater heights.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Heh... That look in your eyes hasn't changed from
that first day either.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: That look has always given me so much courage.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer? I have a favor to ask.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
My path hasn't reached its end yet. I'm not done
running.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want to prove myself as Mejiro Dober, and I
want to establish myself as a new beacon of light
for the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: That's why I won't stop—rather, that's why I can't stop.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But please, don't just watch me from the sidelines.
One day, there will come a time when I can't run
anymore... But until then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Let's make this dream a reality.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
With you by my side, I know we can keep moving
forward.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
In that case though, you can't push yourself too
hard either. I don't want you to try shouldering
everything on your own.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Good.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, Mejiro Dober and I walk back to the
inn while discussing our plans for the future.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Nothing. It's just, your pace quickens when you
get absorbed in conversation.
choice_data_list: Oh, sorry. Was I going too fast?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
No, you're fine. I just feel like I discovered a new
side of yours.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: And, well... That makes me happy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Mejiro Dober and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
